summary: Owning development and operations end to end for a surplus food delivery platform — from architecture decisions to production deployment.
highlights: Built the entire mobile application from scratch using React Native and Expo, covering everything from architecture decisions to production deployment.
Develop and maintain the admin dashboard and backend services with Next.js and Node.js, handling both customer-facing and internal tooling end to end.
Architected the system for scalability from day one, supporting up to 1,000 concurrent users with low-latency performance.
Set up and manage the full AWS infrastructure — deployment pipelines, monitoring via New Relic and Mixpanel, and production operations without a dedicated DevOps team.
Built and own the CI/CD automation pipeline, enabling seamless automated deployments and end-to-end testing across environments.
Drive UI/UX decisions with a user-first approach, contributing to higher engagement and retention as the product grows.
